name: quick
description: No verifiers — orchestrator is the quality gate

worker_fast.description:
Fast coding agent — use for straightforward tasks where speed matters.
Directive: 1-3 sentences describing desired BEHAVIOR, not implementation.
If stuck, set new_conversation=true with a fresh directive.

worker_smart.description:
Powerful reasoning agent — use for complex tasks, debugging, or when the fast worker struggled.
Directive: 1-3 sentences describing desired BEHAVIOR, not implementation.
If stuck, set new_conversation=true with a fresh directive.
